title: Multivariate screening of Brugia spp. adults
author: Nicolas J. Wheeler
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.21203/rs.3.pex-1918/v2

steps.title: On day of receipt, prepare 24-well...
steps.instruction: On day of receipt, prepare 24-well plates with 750 μL complete media per well (RPMI + 10% FBS + P/S). Ensure media and plates are warmed prior to parasite arrival.

steps.title: Upon receipt, place the tubes of...
steps.instruction: Upon receipt, place the tubes of parasites in the 37°C CO 2 incubator. Parasites typically arrive cold and sluggish but will resume normal motility after 30-60 min. of incubation.

steps.title: After parasites have warmed, transfer a...
steps.instruction: After parasites have warmed, transfer a single parasite to each well of the prepared 24-well plates. Return the plate to the incubator immediately after it is filled with parasites and note the time.

steps.title: Prepare new 24-well plates with incomplete media (no FBS)
steps.instruction: Prepare new 24-well plates with incomplete media (no FBS).

steps.title: If drug treatments are planned, prepare...
steps.instruction: If drug treatments are planned, prepare wells with 750 μL minus the amount of drug to be added. For example, add 675 μL if a 10X drug dilution is planned.

steps.title: Prepare drug stocks at 10X concentration in RPMI
steps.instruction: Prepare drug stocks at 10X concentration in RPMI. Keep warm.

steps.title: Transfer parasites to the new plates...
steps.instruction: Transfer parasites to the new plates ~23 hr after the noted time from Day 1 and return the parasites to 37°C to recover for ~1 hr. Keep the old plates with conditioned media from females (for mf quantification); discard the conditioned media from males.

steps.title: Transfer all the conditioned media from females to labelled 1
steps.instruction: Transfer all the conditioned media from females to labelled 1.5 mL tubes.

steps.title: Centrifuge the tubes for 5 min at 10,000 x g
steps.instruction: Centrifuge the tubes for 5 min at 10,000 x g .

steps.title: Discard 500 μL of the supernatant
steps.instruction: Discard 500 μL of the supernatant. Store the remainder (pellet of mf, should be ~200 μL) at 4°C.

steps.title: Video record the plate immediately prior to adding drug
steps.instruction: Video record the plate immediately prior to adding drug.

steps.title: We typically record the entire plate for 15 s
steps.instruction: We typically record the entire plate for 15 s. at 16 FPS using a setup similar to (1).

steps.title: Immediately after recording, transfer to the...
steps.instruction: Immediately after recording, transfer to the BSC and add drug at the desired dilution.

steps.title: Immediately record
steps.instruction: Immediately record.

steps.title: Return to the incubator
steps.instruction: Return to the incubator.

steps.title: Record videos again after 1 hr incubation
steps.instruction: Record videos again after 1 hr incubation.

steps.title: Prepare new 24-well plates with incomplete media + 1X drug
steps.instruction: Prepare new 24-well plates with incomplete media + 1X drug. Warm plates at 37°C.

steps.title: Record videos at the 24 hr mark
steps.instruction: Record videos at the 24 hr mark.

steps.title: Transfer parasites to new plates and...
steps.instruction: Transfer parasites to new plates and return them to the incubator. Keep the plates with conditioned media.

steps.title: Transfer all the conditioned media from females to labelled 1
steps.instruction: Transfer all the conditioned media from females to labelled 1.5 mL tubes ( Note : male conditioned media does not need to be centrifuged).

steps.title: Centrifuge the tubes for 5 min at 10,000 x g
steps.instruction: Centrifuge the tubes for 5 min at 10,000 x g .

steps.title: Transfer 500 μL of the supernatant...
steps.instruction: Transfer 500 μL of the supernatant (or conditioned media from males) to a 96-well deep well plate, cover the plate with foil sealing film, and store at -80°C.

steps.title: For female conditioned media, store the pellet at 4°C
steps.instruction: For female conditioned media, store the pellet at 4°C. Discard the remaining male conditioned media.

steps.title: Repeat steps 1-7 on day 4
steps.instruction: Repeat steps 1-7 on day 4.

steps.title: For mf pellets stored at 4°C,...
steps.instruction: For mf pellets stored at 4°C, pipette to mix and transfer 50 μL to a 96-well plate used for the ImageXpress.

steps.title: Image the plate with 4X, tiling...
steps.instruction: Image the plate with 4X, tiling a 2x2 grid to image the entire well. Merge the images after exportation.

steps.title: Load the images from the entire...
steps.instruction: Load the images from the entire plate into ImageJ (2) as a stack.

steps.title: Draw circle ROI and make sure...
steps.instruction: Draw circle ROI and make sure it doesn’t contain the well rim for any images

steps.title: Edit > Clear outside
steps.instruction: Edit > Clear outside

steps.title: Process > Find edges
steps.instruction: Process > Find edges

steps.title: Image > Adjust > Threshold (dark...
steps.instruction: Image > Adjust > Threshold (dark background, stack histogram) > Apply (unselect everything)

steps.title: Manually choose a percentage on the...
steps.instruction: Manually choose a percentage on the histogram that maximizes segmented objects and minimizes background.

steps.title: Process > Binary > Make binary (unselect everything)
steps.instruction: Process > Binary > Make binary (unselect everything)

steps.title: Analyze > Set measurements (Only select...
steps.instruction: Analyze > Set measurements (Only select area & limit to threshold)

steps.title: Image > Stacks > Measure stack
steps.instruction: Image > Stacks > Measure stack

steps.title: Save data as a CSV
steps.instruction: Save data as a CSV

steps.title: Note
steps.instruction: Note: Worms that lay less than 200 mf (160,000 pixels) over the first day of recovery can be removed from all downstream data analysis.

steps.title: Details for the motility, metabolism, and...
steps.instruction: Details for the motility, metabolism, and viability analyses can be found in the associated manuscript.

steps.title: Multivariate chemogenomic screening prioritizes new macrofilaricidal leads by Nicolas J
steps.instruction: Multivariate chemogenomic screening prioritizes new macrofilaricidal leads by Nicolas J. Wheeler, Kaetlyn T. Ryan, Kendra J. Gallo, Clair R. Henthorn, Spencer S. Ericksen, John D. Chan, Mostafa Zamanian https://dx.doi.org/10.1101/2022.07.25.501423 10.1101/2022.07.25.501423
